Second run with same params gave 0.5603, but that was after running dim=64, wordNgrams=3 which might have overwritten /app/model.bin, but that shouldn't affect the test results since each run retrains and saves.

Actually, I think the issue might be that the first run's model was trained on different data? No, same data.
